title: [3.13] gh-130163: Fix crashes related to PySys_GetObject() (GH-130503)
author: serhiy-storchaka
body:
The use of PySys_GetObject() and _PySys_GetAttr(), which return a borrowed reference, has been replaced by using one of the following functions, which return a strong reference and distinguish a missing attribute from an error: _PySys_GetOptionalAttr(), _PySys_GetOptionalAttrString(), _PySys_GetRequiredAttr(), and _PySys_GetRequiredAttrString(). (cherry picked from commit 0ef4ffeefd1737c18dc9326133c7894d58108c2e)


<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-130163 -->
* Issue: gh-130163
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Thanks @serhiy-storchaka for the PR 🌮🎉.. I'm working now to backport this PR to: 3.12.
🐍🍒⛏🤖

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @serhiy-storchaka, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.12` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker 7c1b76fce8c8df00da38830f72dbdde6881a33be 3.12
```

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
This change introduced reference leaks in the 3.13 branch. Example:

```
$ ./python -m test test_genericalias -R 3:3
(...)
test_genericalias leaked [108, 108, 108] references, sum=324
(...)
```

cc @encukou

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
Example of buildbot failure, Fedora Stable (x86): https://buildbot.python.org/#/builders/1471/builds/551

Failed tests:

- test_genericalias
- test_ast
- test_pickletools
- test_typing

comments.author: serhiy-storchaka
comments.body: Indeed, there is a leak in `_pickle.c` caused by mistake in backporting. Should be fixed by #130568. Thank you @vstinner for noticing.

comments.author: bedevere-app[bot]
comments.body: [GH-130576](https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/130576) is a backport of this pull request to the [3.12 branch](https://github.com/python/cpython/tree/3.12).
